description_long: This is a large, cylindrical black metal barrel with a weathered and scratched surface, indicating prolonged outdoor or industrial use. The barrel features three prominent horizontal metal reinforcement bands spaced evenly along its height. A striking detail is the bright green liquid that appears to be leaking or spilling from the top, running down one side, suggesting the contents are hazardous. On one side, there is a yellow warning label with a radiation symbol, further emphasizing the dangerous nature of the contents. The top of the barrel is sealed, with two small capped openings visible, and the overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian.
description: A weathered black metal barrel with green liquid leaking from the top and a yellow radiation warning label on the side.
description_view_0: The barrel is shown with green liquid dripping down the side and part of the yellow radiation warning label visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the top of the barrel with a green spill, but the warning label is not visible.
description_view_2: The green liquid spill is prominent on the top, but no warning label or significant markings are visible on the side.
description_view_3: The front view clearly displays the green liquid spill and the yellow radiation warning label in full.
